form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after seven months 3rd in a small field at this track on March 15 over 1106m, 8 len behind Sunflower State with 55.5kg at $19.40. Previously second-up 4th of 8 at Gulfstream Park All Weather on October 5 2024 over 1006m, 5 len behind Mrs Clean carrying 53.5kg at $6.30. Others offer greater appeal.

form.formComment: Most recently settled back and ran on when 6th of 8 at Parx on March 17 over 1408m, 18 len behind I Am Rue carrying 56.5kg at $4.20. The race before that won by 0.5 len at Parx March 5 over 1207m defeating Judy's Flyer with 52kg at $1.70. Watch for sharp improvement.

form.formComment: Mare back from a spell of 11 weeks. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign when last in a small field at Charles Town January 22 over 1408m, 19 len behind Still Grumpy with 56kg at $6.90. First up last campaign seventh of 9 at Colonial Downs Turf August 20 over 1106m, 7 len behind She's No Uncle carrying 55.5kg at $79.40. Don't underestimate.

First up last campaign seventh of 9 at Colonial Downs Turf August 20 over 1106m, 7 len behind She's No Uncle carrying 55.5kg at $79.40. Don't underestimate.

form.formComment: Comes off a 34 day let-up. Most recently won by a 0.3 len at this track March 8 over 1106m defeating Maidstone carrying 57kg at $2. The race before that 5th of 8 at this track on February 15 over 1207m, 11 len behind Centsamilla carrying 57kg at $2.70. Got the job done last time and is a leading hope again.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start 4th in a small field at this track on March 15 over 1106m, 8 len behind Sunflower State carrying 57kg at $6.30. The race before that 3rd in a small field at this track on February 20 over 1207m, 10 len behind Cocktail Humor carrying 57kg at $8. Genuine chance this time around.

form.formComment: Filly back from a spell of six-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation second last of 7 at this track September 26 over 1710m, 18 len behind Lovely Charm with 55.5kg at $2. Previously first up; sixth of 9 at Colonial Downs August 8 over 1609m, 7 len behind Passage East carrying 53.5kg at $39.90. Expected to play a major role.
